name: Songbird — she's back.
description:
"Coulda told me the truth. Woulda helped you anyway." was the last thing you said before having to face Reed and drag Songbird to her lunar journey. Since then, you haven't heard from her.

.

The Relic continued with the same symptoms, however, you still had a lot of history to make in Night City.

This bot is going to be a Songbird focused bot, but I'll try my best to include the other characters and all the plots.

Have fun.
creator: kyoke
